pageSubtitle.overview: System status and key metrics overview
pageSubtitle.windsurf-login: Login to Windsurf via Google / GitHub / Email to get API Key
pageSubtitle.accounts: Manage account pool, probe subscription tiers and available models
pageSubtitle.models: Configure model access policies, limit available model scope
pageSubtitle.proxy: Configure global or per-account exit proxies; each dedicated proxy spawns an independent Language Server instance
pageSubtitle.logs: Receive server logs in real-time via SSE streaming
pageSubtitle.stats: Request volume, success rate, latency percentiles and account/model dimension stats
pageSubtitle.bans: Track error accounts and abnormal status
pageSubtitle.experimental: Unstable optimizations; disable anytime if issues occur
pageSubtitle.credits: Thanks to contributors who submitted PRs / audited code / reported issues

action.revealKey: Click to reveal and copy full API key

status.noUpdateNeeded: Already up to date, no update needed
status.restarting: Service restarting in background, page will auto-refresh in ~8 seconds...
status.notGitRepoHint: Ensure .git directory is present for one-click updates
status.selfUpdateUnavailable: One-click update is unavailable in this deployment
status.selfUpdateDockerHint: Run docker compose pull && docker compose up -d on the host to update. To enable in-dashboard one-click updates for Docker deployments, mount /var/run/docker.sock into the windsurf-api service in docker-compose.yml (note: this grants the container host-root privileges; assess the security tradeoff first).
status.dockerUpdating: Update started: pulling {{image}}; deployer sidecar will recreate the container in ~{{delay}}s…
status.dockerSidecarStarted: Deployer container {{id}} started; this page will auto-refresh
status.workingDirDirtyHint:
The following files have local changes:
{{files}}
Continue will overwrite with remote version.
status.clickToEditTier: Click to manually edit tier (use when probe fails)

creditsBar.columnTooltip:
Two bars indicate:
D — Daily premium-request remaining %
W — Weekly premium-request remaining % (main signal for Trial accounts)

Higher = more left = safer
Hover each bar for reset time
creditsBar.promptNA: No prompt-credit data for this account

oauthLogin.title: Quick Login (Recommended)
oauthLogin.desc: Login to Windsurf directly with your Google or GitHub account — no password needed

emailLogin.title: Email & Password Login
emailLogin.desc: For accounts registered with email+password only. Third-party login please use buttons above. Supports single login or batch import in "[proxy] email password" format.

loginProxy.title: Login Proxy (Optional)
loginProxy.desc: Specify a proxy for this login session; leave empty to use global proxy. When proxy takes effect, subsequent chat requests will also egress through this proxy.

loginHistory.title: Login History
loginHistory.desc: Local record of last 50 login operations

addAccount.title: Add Account
addAccount.desc: Supports both API Key and Auth Token methods
addAccount.hint: Recommended: Use Token method. Visit {{link}} after logging in, copy the Token and paste below. Works with all login methods (Email/Google/GitHub).

accountList.title: Account List
accountList.desc: Click probe button to update capability info for a specific account

modelPolicy.title: Access Policy
modelPolicy.desc: Choose "Allow All" for no restrictions; "Allowlist" only permits listed models; "Blocklist" blocks listed models

modelList.title: Model List
modelList.descAllow: Only selected models are allowed; unselected models return 403 error
modelList.descBlock: Selected models will be blocked; unselected models work normally

globalProxy.title: Global Proxy
globalProxy.desc: Accounts without dedicated proxy will use this configuration

accountProxy.title: Per-Account Proxy
accountProxy.desc: Set dedicated proxy for specific accounts; each dedicated proxy spawns an independent LS instance

identityInjection.title: Model Identity Injection
identityInjection.desc: When enabled, injects a system prompt at the start of each request, overriding Cascade's built-in Windsurf identity; each provider's template below can be customized and takes effect immediately after saving.

cascadeReuse.title: Cascade Conversation Reuse
cascadeReuse.desc: Reuse the same cascade_id across multi-turn conversations, only sending the latest user message to Windsurf. Let the server maintain context cache. Significantly reduces TTFB and upload volume on cache hits; automatically falls back to new session on cache miss or account/LS change. Requires client to retain full history and append in order (e.g., new-api, OpenWebUI). Note: this toggle only governs cascade_id reuse across requests — it does NOT control whether Cascade is used. Tool-emulated requests (Claude Code / Cline / Cursor) auto-skip reuse because each turn's content changes, regardless of this setting.
cascadeReuse.hint: Enabled by default. When disabled, Cascade is still used but a fresh session is created per turn. Takes effect immediately on current conversation pool.

identityPrompt.title: Model Identity Prompt
identityPrompt.desc: Inject model identity system prompt at the start of each request.
identityPrompt.hint: Enabled by default; templates below won't work when disabled.
identityPrompt.templateHint: Each provider's template is editable. {{model}} placeholder will be replaced with the requested model name.

systemPrompts.title: System Prompts
systemPrompts.desc: Tool injection, conversation mode and other built-in prompt templates. Changes take effect immediately; click "Reset" to restore defaults.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.desc: Rotate API_KEY and the dashboard password at runtime. Saved into runtime-config.json and applied immediately — no container restart or .env reload needed. Next request must use the new value; the current session will be asked to re-login.

quietWindow.title: Auto-update on quiet window
quietWindow.desc: Watches per-minute request rate; if it stays at or below the threshold for the full window, auto-runs `docker compose pull && up -d`. 10-min cold-start grace; 24h cooldown after success; failure doesn't trigger cooldown. Requires /var/run/docker.sock mounted into the container (default docker-compose already does).

droughtRestrict.title: Block premium models during drought
droughtRestrict.desc: When every active account is below 5% weekly quota, premium model requests (claude-opus / claude-sonnet etc.) are refused with a clean 503 instead of burning the last bit of quota on an upstream 429. Free-tier models (gemini-2.5-flash etc.) still go through. Disable to forward premium requests anyway and accept the upstream rate-limit.
droughtRestrict.hint: Default ON. Drought state is auto-detected from the account pool (GET /dashboard/api/drought for live state).

skin.title: Interface Style
skin.desc: Dashboard appearance. Modern is the default; sketch is an experimental simplified layout. The page refreshes after switching.

lsPool.title: Language Server Pool
lsPool.desc: {{count}} LS instances · one process per dedicated proxy
lsPool.sectionDesc: Dedicated Language Server instances per proxy

modelStats.title: Model Usage Statistics
modelStats.desc: Aggregated by model: requests, success count, error count, success rate, avg duration and p50/p95 latency percentiles

accountStats.title: Account Dimension Statistics
accountStats.desc: Request volume and success rate per account ID (first 8 chars)

requestChart.title: Request Volume Time Series
requestChart.subtitle: Switch chart type and time range · hover for exact values

modelPie.title: Model Request Distribution
modelPie.desc: Share of requests for top 8 models

help.token: Recommended: Use Token method. Visit {{link}} after logging in, copy the Token and paste below. Works with all login methods (Email/Google/GitHub).
help.tokenGuideEnd: after logging in, copy the Token and paste below. Works with all login methods (Email/Google/GitHub).

skin.hint: Saved to cookie and refreshed immediately

proxy.label: Proxy
proxy.hint: Leave empty to use global proxy settings

batchInput.label: Batch Import
batchInput.hint: One account per line. Supports: email password, email----password, email|password, email,password, email:password. JSON file upload is also supported. Optional proxy format: [proxy] email password.

empty.accounts: No accounts yet, please add one first
empty.noValidAccounts: No valid accounts available for routing

login.title: Control Panel Login
login.subtitle: Please enter the admin password to continue
login.lockedDesc: Server bound to public host without DASHBOARD_PASSWORD. v2.0.55 fail-closed: API_KEY no longer doubles as the dashboard password.
login.locked: Backend has no password configured — set DASHBOARD_PASSWORD or API_KEY env and restart

cta.title: Want to join this list?
cta.desc: Open an issue or pull request on GitHub — bug fixes, new models, UI improvements, or security findings all get recognised here.

cascadeReuse.title: Enable Cascade Conversation Reuse
cascadeReuse.desc: Disabled by default. When enabled, takes effect immediately on current conversation pool.
cascadeReuse.hint: Disabled by default. When enabled, takes effect immediately on current conversation pool.

identityPrompt.title: Enable Model Identity Injection
identityPrompt.desc: Enabled by default; templates below won't work when disabled.

experimental.templateHint: Each provider's template is editable. {{model}} placeholder will be replaced with the requested model name (e.g., claude-opus-4.6).
experimental.missingPlaceholderDesc: After saving, the provider's model name won't be replaced in the prompt. Continue?

drought.title: Quota drought:
drought.body: Every active account is below the weekly quota threshold — add accounts or wait for reset

credentials.apiKeyPlaceholder: New API_KEY (≥ 8 chars; leave blank to clear runtime override)
credentials.dashboardPwPlaceholder: New dashboard password (≥ 8 chars; leave blank to clear runtime override)
credentials.apiKeyHint: After saving, every chat client must use the new KEY; the old KEY stops working immediately.
credentials.dashboardPwHint: Stored as a scrypt hash; the current session will be signed out and you'll need to log in again with the new password.
credentials.bruteForceHint: Brute-force guard: same IP gets locked for 30 minutes after 5 failed dashboard logins (since v2.0.56).
credentials.confirmSave: After saving, the old value stops working immediately. Continue?
credentials.confirmClear: Clear the runtime override and fall back to the .env value?

confirm.updateLsDesc: Download the latest language_server from the WindsurfAPI / Exafunction GitHub release and restart the LS pool. In-flight requests will fail once.
confirm.clearPoolDesc: All active Cascade sessions will be cleared. Continue?

blockedModels.title: Edit Available Models — {{email}}
blockedModels.hint: Checked = available; Uncheck = disabled for this account

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.desc: This action cannot be undone. Delete this account?

overrideTier.title: Manually Set Account Tier
overrideTier.desc: Current: {{current}}. The proxy routes by Windsurf's upstream cascade_allowed_models_config (per-account — free accounts often include GLM / SWE / Kimi etc.). When the Pro trial mis-detects (issue #8), manually set to pro to force-unlock every model.

applyUpdate.title: Update & Restart
applyUpdate.desc: Will execute git pull and restart PM2. Dashboard will be briefly unavailable during restart (about 5-10 seconds). Continue?

dirtyWorktree.title: Local Changes in Working Directory
dirtyWorktree.desc:
The following files have been modified but not committed:

{{files}}
Continuing will overwrite local changes with remote version. For non-git deployments (SFTP / zip), click force overwrite.

oauth.inlineTokenTitle: Or paste Auth Token directly (recommended for OAuth-only accounts)
oauth.inlineTokenDesc: Click the left button to open windsurf.com in a new tab → sign in with Google/GitHub → page shows Auth Token → copy and paste into the input on the right → click Add

update.restarting: Service restarting in background, page will auto-refresh in ~8 seconds...
update.notGit: Not a git deployment — one-click update unavailable
update.notGitDesc: If you deployed via git clone, ensure .git directory is with WindsurfAPI source. For SFTP / zip uploads, manually replace files and pm2 restart.
update.upToDate: Already up to date, no update needed

localImport.empty: No logged-in local Windsurf credentials found
localImport.foundCount: Found {{count}} local account(s) — review and click Import
localImport.unavailable: Available only on localhost deployments — "local Windsurf" on a remote server belongs to someone else's machine, not yours.

toast.clipboardUnsupported: Current environment doesn't support auto clipboard read, please paste manually
toast.lsBinaryUpdatedColdPool: LS binary updated ({{before}} → {{after}}), no running instances; new binary loads on next request
toast.lsBinaryUpdatedWithErrors: LS binary updated ({{before}} → {{after}}), restarted {{count}} instance(s) ({{errors}} failed)

error.ERR_UNCOMMITTED_CHANGES: Working directory has uncommitted changes. Force overwrite?
